title: GenomeResult
description: A2 GenomeScorer result (01-TECH_SPEC §5): ring → subfactor → scored cell. Scores without at least one evidence_ref are schema-invalid — the Verifier rejects them. SHAPE DEVIATION FROM SPEC (flagged for G1 schema review): 01-TECH_SPEC §5 sketches ring names at the top level of the result; this schema nests the ring map under an explicit 'rings' key because dynamic top-level keys cannot coexist with additionalProperties:false on the envelope.

sigmoid_admit_probs.description: school_tier → admission probability from the sigmoid admission model.

evidence_refs.description: A score without evidence is invalid: minItems 1 is deliberate and load-bearing.

delta_vs_last.description: Delta vs the previous scoring pass; null on the baseline pass.
